stemHtml:
When is an altitude deviation report required when operating in the North Atlantic High Level Airspace (NAT HLA)?

1. When deviating altitude more than 200 ft in RVSM only
2. When deviating altitude more than 300 ft in Non RVSM only
3. When deviating altitude more than 300 ft, whatever the airspace
4. When deviating from your route in a contingency
5. When deviating altitude 300 ft for weather
